title: Common definitions
description: Shared primitives referenced across the platform-spec schemas. Not validated against directly.

localizedText.description: A label/description keyed by locale (BCP-47 short tag, e.g. en, fr). At least one entry required.

typeName.description: PascalCase type name, e.g. JournalEntry, GLAccount.

fieldName.description: camelCase field name, e.g. companyId, postingDate.

stateName.description: Workflow state name, e.g. Draft, UnderReview.
